title: rollback autopilot resume preCompact snapshot
purpose: G6.3 defines rollback autopilot resume precompact snapshot for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G6.3` only; siblings under `G6` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: On preCompact hook fire per [I1.4](I1.4-runtime-ide-hooks-beforesubmit-subagentstart-pretooluse-prec.md), sync-state writes a snapshot capturing next_action, evidence_files, last_verify, gates_pending, and autopilot.active before context compaction.
After IDE restart or session compact, autopilot resume reloads the last good dual-write of journal/state.json plus the preCompact snapshot—never inferring pursuit state from chat memory.
The conductor reads full journal/progress.md and Context files listed there before invoking continue, even when hooks inject a summary line.
check-pipeline-blocked.py runs against restored state so stop/continue decisions match the pre-compact wake; corrupt snapshot fails validate-workflow and surfaces H2.
If snapshot and journal/state disagree after reload, pursuit halts at H2 until the operator reconciles from evidence paths in [H6](H6-snapshots.md) rather than best-effort guessing next_action.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G6.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G6.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G6.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G6.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G6.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: G6.3 defines rollback autopilot resume precompact snapshot for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system on precompact hook fire per [i1.4](i1.4-runtime-ide-hooks-beforesubmit-subagentstart-pretooluse-prec.md), sync-state writes a snapshot capturing next_action, evidence_files, last_verify, gates_pending, and autopilot.active before context compaction, then after ide restart or session compact, autopilot resume reloads the last good dual-write of journal/state.json plus the precompact snapshot—never inferring pursuit state from chat memory.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

Autopilot resume after session compact or IDE restart reloads preCompact snapshot plus last good dual-write of journal/state.json—never chat memory. Hooks may inject a summary; conductor still reads full journal and Context files before continue.

Snapshot includes next_action, evidence_files, last_verify, gates_pending, and autopilot.active so check-pipeline-blocked reproduces the same stop/continue decision. Corrupt snapshot triggers validate-workflow failure and H2, not best-effort guess.
